Thanks for opening a PR. Please fill in every section below. PRs that do not
follow the template will be asked for changes before review.
-->

## Linked issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR closes. Use `Closes #<n>` to auto-close on merge. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. Delete the rest. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`!`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Test (`test:`)
- [ ] Build / CI (`build:` / `ci:`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore:`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf:`)

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph. Describe the change in terms of the user-visible behavior. -->

## How did you verify your code works?

<!-- Check every box that applies. Be honest. -->

- [ ] `bun test` passes locally (111/111).
- [ ] `bunx oxlint .` passes locally.
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I read [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) and followed the project rules.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the contribution flow.
- [ ] I manually exercised the new behavior with a real transcript and screenshots.
- [ ] I checked for regressions in adjacent surfaces (compiler, redaction, preview, OpenCode bridge).

## AI authorship

<!-- Required. The human in the loop is the one who clicks Merge. -->

- [ ] I understand this change and can defend it in code review.
- [ ] I am the human author of this PR. Any AI assistance is described above.
